## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any issue. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run check` passes locally (typecheck + tests + conformance)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or credentials committed
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior/structure changed
- [ ] Touches a `human_required` path (`.github/workflows/**`, `.open-autonomy/autonomy.yml`,
      `docs/CONSTITUTION.md`, `.codex/skills/**`, `services/**/wrangler.toml`)? Flag it for review.
- [ ] Commits signed off (`git commit -s`, DCO)
